items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 3 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading」、「Quoting Nilay Patel」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Large language model (LLM) training workloads increasingly run into GPU memory limits before compute is fully used. Model weights, gradients, optimizer states,...
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: AI Model Co-Design: Hardware-Friendly LLM Design

items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: Quoting Nilay Patel
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：The reality is to make augmented reality glasses, you need to put a camera next to your eyes that is continuously recording everything you see and processing that to put information over it. There is not another way aro…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
